characters.name: Alexander Demoret
characters.description: Alexander DemoretBiographical InformationDied2007StatusDeceasedOccupationModelPhysical InformationSpeciesVampireGenderMaleFamily InformationFamily MembersNicole Demoret(sister)RelationshipsChristina(ex-lover/sire)Supernatural InformationDate Turned2007PowersVampire Physiology:ImmortalitySuperhuman StrengthSuperhuman SpeedSuperhuman SensesSuperhuman AgilitySuperhuman StaminaAccelerated HealingHypnosisKilled ByHenry FitzroyCause of DeathFist through the heartAppearancesActorAndrew FrancisFirst SeenThe Devil You KnowEpisode(s)1Seasons2 Alexander Demoretis a vampire working as a male model and was formerly the subject ofChristina, who followed her to Toronto in order to hunt her down. Alexander lived with his younger sister Nicole and took care of her after their parents died. Six months ago, she lost contact with her brother after he met a woman, Christina who was his photographer for a shoot back in New York. At some point in their relationship, Christina turned him into a vampire and has been following her ever since.

characters.name: Allison Crowley
characters.description: Allison CrowleyBiographical InformationStatusAliveOccupationPolice ChiefAffiliationToronto PDPhysical InformationSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleHair ColorBlondeAppearancesActorEileen PeddeFirst SeenBlood Price: Part TwoLast SeenDeep DarkEpisode(s)7Seasons1,2Allison Crowleyis Mike Celluci's supervisor at the Toronto Police Dept who oversees all of his cases and tries to keep him in-line. She is first seen disciplining Mike after she feels he is being distracted from his job due to his relationship with Vicki. Crowley later becomes directly involved in one of Vicki and Mike's cases. It is revealed that as a rookie cop in homicide, she pulled over Magnus O'Connor, opened the passenger side door and a severed head rolled out onto the street across from a children's playground. In order to protect the kids from seeing this, she put her police jacket over the head which in-turn, contaminated the crime scene and would have made it inadmissible in court.

characters.name: Angelique
characters.description: AngeliqueBiographical InformationDied2007StatusDeceasedAliasesZombie QueenOccupationOwner of JuJu LoungePhysical InformationSpeciesHuman /Voodoo PriestessGenderFemaleHair ColorBlackEye ColorBrownFamily InformationFamily MembersRoyale(brother)Supernatural InformationPowersDark Voodoo MagicObject EnchantmentNecromancySpellcastingSignificant KillsPapa Samedi†Killed ByVoodoo God'sCause of DeathDragged to hellAppearancesActorMichael-Ann ConnorFirst SeenBad JuJuLast SeenBad JuJuEpisode(s)1Seasons1Angeliqueis a young woman originally from New Orleans who hiredVicki Nelsonto track down her missing brother Royale. She is the owner of the JuJu Lounge, a bar in Toronto. Angelique is worried when her brother has gone missing and uses all of her savings in order to hire Vicki Nelson to investigate and invites her to her bar in order to make the business arrangements. As they leave, they are attacked by a zombie who chases after Angelique. Vicki manages to rescue her but Angelique has disappeared. Vicki teams up with Henry, who informs her of the voodoo magic that is circling around this case and they head out in search of Angelique. They manage to track her down and witness her practicing a voodoo ritual. She then tells Vicki the truth, about how she is a Voodoo Mamba (priest) and this art has been passed through to her and her brother, after her parents were murdered by Dark Voodoo practitioners.

characters.description: AstarothTrue FormPossessing CoreenPossessing RayBiographical InformationStatusAliveOccupationDemonic LordAffiliationHellfire Club(worshiped by)Physical InformationSpeciesDemonGenderMaleFamily InformationRelationshipsDemon(servant)Supernatural InformationPowersDemon Physiology:PossessionDark MagicTelekinesisSuperhuman StrengthSignificant KillsNorman BridewellKilled ByHenry Fitzroy(sent back to hell)AppearancesActorJohn Mann(Blood Price)Gina HoldenGreg BrykFirst SeenBlood Price: Part TwoLast SeenDeep DarkEpisode(s)2Seasons1, 2Astarothis a demonic lord, worshipped by many cults over the years and who requires multiple blood sacrifices in order to escape hell. He was cast out by god and therefore, wants to wreak havoc on Earth as revenge.

characters.name: Brendan Ledford
characters.description: Brendan LedfordBiographical InformationDied2007StatusDeceasedOccupationModelPhysical InformationSpeciesHumanGenderMaleFamily InformationRelationshipsElena(fling)Supernatural InformationKilled ByDimitriCause of DeathTurned to stone and broken into piecesAppearancesActorGreyston HoltFirst SeenStone ColdEpisode(s)1Seasons1 Brendan Ledfordwas an on-the-ride model who loved to party when he encounters beautiful club owner Elena and becomes a victim of her ancient powers. Brendan was out partying, as usual, when he meets the beautiful Elena, who owns a night club popularised by models like himself. They are at home, making out passionately in the dark in her apartment. He wants to see her but she tells him to use his other senses apart from his eyes instead. They continue kissing when he notices a mirror on the wall across from them.

characters.name: Chuntao Fang
characters.description: Chuntao FangBiographical InformationStatusAliveOccupationGang LeaderAffiliationDragon'sPhysical InformationSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleAppearancesActorKira ClavellFirst SeenD.O.A.Episode(s)1Seasons2 Chuntao Fangis the leader of a drug-smuggling biker gang, the Dragons, who was secretly being passed information about their rivals, the Wolverine's byPaul Deeds. Chuntao is the lead of the Dragons, a Chinese gang who has been causing havoc in the criminal underworld of Toronto. For six months, Paul Deeds had been feeding her information about the Wolverines, a gang that rivals the Dragons and unknown to her, wants the gangs to tear each other apart, while Deeds himself takes cash payments.

characters.name: Dave Graham
characters.description: Dave GrahamBiographical InformationStatusAliveOccupationDetectiveAffiliationToronto PDPhysical InformationSpeciesHumanAppearancesActorKeith DallasFirst SeenBlood PriceLast SeenDeep DarkEpisode(s)11Seasons1,2Detective Dave Grahamis a colleague ofMike Celluciwho works alongsideKate Lamto help him with his cases. Dave Graham is the new partner of Mike Celluci, who has heard all about his dramas with Vicki Nelson. He  acts more like a friend to Mike and will give him advice, whether he asks for it or not, about Vicki and their limbo relationship, while also hinting he has complicated relationships of his own. He often assists Mike on his cases and is usually the first one to call out something that seems weird, although is not open to the supernatural like Mike is. Despite this, he tries his best to support Mike and thanks to his wisecracking ways, has become a good friend to him and whether he likes it or not, will offer advice on love and relationships.

characters.name: Dr. Betty Sagara
characters.description: Dr. Betty SagaraBiographical InformationStatusAliveOccupationProfessor of DemonologyAffiliationToronto UniversityPhysical InformationSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleHair ColorGreyFamily InformationRelationshipsHenry Fitzroy(friend/ex-lover)AppearancesFirst SeenBlood Price: Part TwoLast SeenNormanEpisode(s)3Seasons1Dr. Betty Sagarais a long-time friend ofHenry Fitzroyand a professor of Demonology, who sometimes assistsVickiin her supernatural cases. It is unknown how or when Henry met Dr. Sagara, but they have a long-term friendship (as they used to be former flames) and she is highly respected by Henry, due to her many years of keeping his status as a vampire a secret. She is first seen helping Vicki track down ademonthat has been loose in Toronto and has killed several people. Betty gives Vicki and Henry a list of all of the students in her class that have shown an over-interest in demonology and therefore potential subjects in who summoned the demon. Betty appears again during a time of crisis, when Vicki is hoping to track down Henry who has been kidnapped by Javier Mendoza. Vicki is hoping to find the origins of amysterious devicethat managed to incapacitate and hurt Henry and she sends her assistantCoreento talk with Betty to find out what the device is and how to stop it. Coreen, an avid lover of all things occult, is fascinated to speak with Dr. Sagara and the two combine their knowledge and research skills to successfully find out more about the device and more importantly, how to deactivate it.

characters.name: Dr. Rajani Mohadevan
characters.description: Dr. Rajani MohadevanBiographical InformationStatusAliveOccupationCoronorAffiliationToronto PDToronto Coroner's OfficePhysical InformationSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleAppearancesActorNimet KanjiFirst SeenBlood PriceLast SeenWe'll Meet AgainEpisode(s)13Seasons1,2Dr. Rajani Mohadevanis the coroner for the Toronto Police Dept and regularly assists Vicki Nelson and Mike Celluci as they investigate their mysterious cases. Toronto Coroner's Office She is very respectful of the dead and even talks to them as though they are actually alive. Rajani is very intelligent and open to discussion, even if it's from a world she doesn't understand. She remains very optimistic and is passionate about her work. characters.description: EmanuelBiographical InformationStatusAliveOccupationGardenerPhysical InformationSpeciesIncubusGenderMaleHair ColorBrownFamily InformationRelationshipsMarcy †(lover)Wendy(lover)Isabel †(lover)Cheryl(lover)Supernatural InformationPowersSeductionDream WalkingImmortalityAppearancesActorCraig VeroniFirst SeenLove HurtsLast SeenLove HurtsEpisode(s)1Seasons1 Wendy(lover)Isabel †(lover)Cheryl(lover) Emanuelis an Incubus who was accidentally summoned by a group of frustrated suburban women. He appeared to them as a handsome gardener and secretly feeds off of their sexual energy in order to sustain himself.

characters.name: Father Ray Cascioli
characters.description: Ray CascioliBiographical InformationStatusAlive(possessed)AliasesFather CascioliOccupationPriestPhysical InformationSpeciesHumanGenderMaleAppearancesActorGreg BrykFirst SeenDeep DarkEpisode(s)1Seasons2 Father Ray Cascioliis an old friend of Henry Fitzroy's, who is asked by Vicki Nelson to perform an exorcism when her assistant Coreen is possessed. Father Cascioli became friendly with Henry after meeting him through church, although he doesn't do Midnight Mass quite as much as Henry would like. When Coreen Fennel is possessed by the demon Astaroth, Henry tells Vicki that he knows a priest who can help save her.

characters.description: Felicia BannickHumanWerejaguarBiographical InformationStatusAliveOccupationCocktail WaitressPhysical InformationSpeciesSkin-walkerGenderFemaleFamily InformationFamily MembersMr. Bannick(father)Robert Bannick †(brother)Alyssa Bannick(sister)Supernatural InformationPowersSkinwalker Physiology:Jaguar TransformationSignificant KillsMelvilleAppearancesActorEllen DubinFirst SeenWild BloodEpisode(s)1Seasons2 Robert Bannick †(brother)Alyssa Bannick(sister) Felicia Bannickwas a small town woman who left her controlling father to move to the city, where she works as a cocktail waitress. She is taken into custody as Mike is convinced she is responsible for the brutal murder of a wealthy man, but all is not as it seems.

characters.name: Helen Underhill
characters.description: Helen UnderhillBiographical InformationBorn1982(current lifetime)StatusAliveAliasesAlice SmithPhysical InformationSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleFamily InformationFamily MembersBarton Underhill(husband)Unborn ChildRelationshipsLee(former husband)Supernatural InformationPowersReincarnationAppearancesActorLara GilchristFirst SeenWe'll Meet AgainEpisode(s)1Seasons2 Unborn Child Helen Underhillis a who, for 400 years, has been constantly reincarnated alongside her star-crossed lover. However, something has changed in this cycle and she now finds herself married to another man while her destined lover, Lee, is now 15 years old hoping to rekindle their age old romance.

characters.name: Ivan Ulyanov
characters.description: Ivan UlyanovBiographical InformationStatusAliveOccupationFuneral Home WorkerAffiliationNecrodromePhysical InformationSpeciesHumanGenderMaleFamily InformationFamily MembersBoris Ulyanov(father)Supernatural InformationSignificant KillsWilliam CarmichaelAppearancesActorG. Michael GrayFirst SeenNecrodromeEpisode(s)1Seasons1 Ivan Ulyanovworks in the funeral home ran by his father, Boris, and is secretly the ringleader of a live-streamed fighting ring using re-animated fighters. Ivan managed to obtain ancient Egyptian relics that once belonged to Anubis, the god of the dead. When a wrestler named Carl Blundell was found dead, Ivan got the idea to create a fighting arena using using mindless zombies who are easy control. He re-animated Carl and set his sights on another fighter for him to spar with, Diesel Swanson. He enlisted the help of bartender William Carmichael (and researcher of necromancy), who worked at the Dome, a bar which Swanson often frequent. He got William to split paracetamol into Diesel's drinks which, over time, caused him to develop liver failure that killed him.
